text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Tachyon is delighted to hear about
Manhattan Cafe's decision to compete.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems as if the Yayoi Sho holds great
importance to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But Manhattan Cafe's only goal is to get closer to
her friend, who exists far beyond Agnes Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Manhattan Cafe looks exhausted from the sheer
effort she's been putting in... She's ready to give
this race all she's got.
